title: Weber Bargain - Looking for One
body:
I’ve been wanting to get the Weber charcoal master touch for some time. Unfortunately, I missed the $435 bargain . The cheapest I can now find is $509 .
Does anyone know how/where I might be able to score one for cheaper?
I see TCN gift cards include Weber store. The issue is Weber sells it at full price of $600. If I were to get them to price match it to the price above and use gc at 10% off, it can get down to about $450. The question is, does Weber price match? This is the only cheaper option that comes to mind. Does anyone have any other strategies?
